evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "TaskCard" matches "Per-field readiness states on tasks — Each important task field needs a clear readiness state so the Task Card and Editor agree on what is filled, unset, or intentionally not needed. — Define field-level readiness states (ready / filled / unset / not-needed) for date, missing data, specs, sender, receiver, channel, subtasks.
